:@.name: aspiration_valid_age_type
:@.description:
Valid age type for this aspiration. For example, if CHILD_ONLY is selected, 
this aspiration can only be completed by a child and sim will not be considered complete 
even if all of the objectives are completed as a non-child.
Note: Teen can complete both teen and YAE aspiration but YAE can not complete teen aspiration.
TODDLER_ONLY aspiration will not shown in UI as toddlers can not select their aspirations.

:@.name: can_complete_without_objectives
:@.description:
If checked, this Milestone can have 0 objectives and be completed.
If unchecked, having zero objectives won't complete this Milestone. 
This can be used for Milestones like Missions that have dynamically-
added Objectives that might not be available when the Milestone is 
tested for completion.

:@.name: descriptive_text
:@.description: Description for this aspiration

:@.name: display_name
:@.description: Display name for this aspiration

:@.name: do_not_register_events_on_load
:@.display: Do Not Register Events On Load
:@.description:
If checked we will not register these events on load.

This should be checked for all aspirations that are part of an
aspiration track.

:@.name: exclusivity_type
:@.description:
An enum representing the exclusivity type of this Milestone.
When generating the list of possible milestones to offer, exclusivity
types will be used to prevent milestones with the same exclusivity type
from being offered together.
Note: Only works for career assignments at the moment.

:@.name: is_child_aspiration
:@.description:
This tuning is DEPRECATED, use aspiration_valid_age_type instead. 
If checked then this aspiration can only be completed by a child
Sim and will not be considered complete even if all of the
Objectives are complete as a non-child.

:@.name: is_teen_aspiration
:@.description:
This tuning is DEPRECATED, use aspiration_valid_age_type instead. 
If checked then this aspiration can only be completed by a teen
Sim and will not be considered complete even if all of the
Objectives are complete as a non-teen.

:@.name: complete_all
:@.description:
All of the Objectives as part of this Milestone must be completed
in order for this Milestone to be considered complete.

:@.name: number_required
:@.description:
The number of objectives as part of this Milestone that must be
completed until this Milestone is considered complete.

:@.name: complete_subset
:@.description:
A numerical subset of the total Objectives need to be complete for
this Milestone to be considered complete.

:@.name: objective_completion_type
:@.description: A requirement of what objectives need to be completed.

An Objective that is one of the requirements for this Milestone
to be completed.

:@.name: objectives
:@.description:
A list of all of the Objectives that will be tracked in order for
this Milestone to be completed.  Using the Objective Completion Type
we will determine the action number of Objectives that need to be
completed.

:@.name: on_complete_loot_actions
:@.description:
List of loots operations that will be awarded when this aspiration
completes.

:@.name: reward
:@.description: The reward given when this Aspiration is completed.

:@.name: active_sim_only
:@.description:
If true, the screen slam will be only be shown if the active Sim
triggers it.

:@.name: audio
:@.description: The sound to play.

:@.name: immediate_audio
:@.description:
If checked, this audio will be triggered immediately, nothing
will block.

ex. Earbuds audio will be played immediately while 
the Sim is routing or animating.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The name of the slot this audio is attached to.

:@.name: joint_name_hash
:@.description:
Specify if the audio is attached to a slot and, if so, which
slot. Otherwise the audio will be attached to the object's 
origin.

:@.name: play_on_active_sim_only
:@.description:
If enabled, and audio target is Sim, the audio will only be 
played on selected Sim. Otherwise it will be played regardless 
Sim is selected or not.

If audio target is Object, always set this to False. Otherwise
the audio will never be played.

ex. This will be useful for Earbuds where we want to hear the
music only when the Sim is selected.

:@.name: audio_sting
:@.description:
A sting to play at the same time as the screen slam.
***Some screen slams may appear to play a sting, but the audio is
actually tuned on something else.  Example: On CareerLevel tuning
there already is a tunable, Promotion Audio Sting, to trigger a
sting, so one is not necessary on the screen slam.  Make sure to
avoid having multiple stings play simultaneously.***

:@.name: key
:@.description:
Key to use for the screenslam. This will be typically tied
to what animation will play. Verify with your UI partner
what the correct value to use will be.

:@.name: key_based
:@.description:
Screen Slam visual is dictated by a string key.

Verify with your UI partner what this should be.

:@.name: screen_slam_size
:@.description: Screen slam size.

:@.name: size_based
:@.description: Screen Slam visual is dictated by the value of the size tunable.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: icon
:@.description:
,
Icon to be displayed for the screen Slam.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: text
:@.description:
"
Text of the screen slam.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: title
:@.description: Title of the screen slam.

:@.name: literal
:@.description: Tunable Screen Slams!

:@.name: reference
:@.description: A reference to a ScreenSlam tuning snippet.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: This may be tuned in place here using 'literal' or as a reference to a ScreenSlam tuning snippet.

:@.name: screen_slam
:@.description:
Which screen slam to show when this aspiration is complete.
Localization Tokens: Sim - {0.SimFirstName}, Milestone Name - 
{1.String}, Aspiration Track Name - {2.String}. 
Works with Full Aspirations and Career Aspirations only.

:@.name: active_sim_only
:@.description:
If true, the screen slam will be only be shown if the active Sim
triggers it.

:@.name: audio
:@.description: The sound to play.

:@.name: immediate_audio
:@.description:
If checked, this audio will be triggered immediately, nothing
will block.

ex. Earbuds audio will be played immediately while 
the Sim is routing or animating.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The name of the slot this audio is attached to.

:@.name: joint_name_hash
:@.description:
Specify if the audio is attached to a slot and, if so, which
slot. Otherwise the audio will be attached to the object's 
origin.

:@.name: play_on_active_sim_only
:@.description:
If enabled, and audio target is Sim, the audio will only be 
played on selected Sim. Otherwise it will be played regardless 
Sim is selected or not.

If audio target is Object, always set this to False. Otherwise
the audio will never be played.

ex. This will be useful for Earbuds where we want to hear the
music only when the Sim is selected.

:@.name: audio_sting
:@.description:
A sting to play at the same time as the screen slam.
***Some screen slams may appear to play a sting, but the audio is
actually tuned on something else.  Example: On CareerLevel tuning
there already is a tunable, Promotion Audio Sting, to trigger a
sting, so one is not necessary on the screen slam.  Make sure to
avoid having multiple stings play simultaneously.***

:@.name: key
:@.description:
Key to use for the screenslam. This will be typically tied
to what animation will play. Verify with your UI partner
what the correct value to use will be.

:@.name: key_based
:@.description:
Screen Slam visual is dictated by a string key.

Verify with your UI partner what this should be.

:@.name: screen_slam_size
:@.description: Screen slam size.

:@.name: size_based
:@.description: Screen Slam visual is dictated by the value of the size tunable.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: The icon image to be displayed.

:@.name: icon
:@.description:
,
Icon to be displayed for the screen Slam.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: text
:@.description:
"
Text of the screen slam.

:@.name: enabled
:@.description: A localized string that may use tokens.

:@.name: title
:@.description: Title of the screen slam.

:@.name: literal
:@.description: Tunable Screen Slams!

:@.name: reference
:@.description: A reference to a ScreenSlam tuning snippet.

:@.name: screen_slam
:@.description: This may be tuned in place here using 'literal' or as a reference to a ScreenSlam tuning snippet.

:@.name: tests
:@.description: Tests that have to pass for the screen slam to show.

:@.name: testable_screen_slam
:@.description:
Which screen slam to show when this aspiration is complete AND
all tests have passed.
Works with Timed Aspirations only.

:@.name: track_completion_count
:@.description:
If checked, this Milestone will track how many times it's been
completed, even through resets. For instance, GP09 Missions reuse the 
same Aspiration but still need to track how many times the Aspiration
has been completed.

A Basic Aspiration that can be displayed to the UI.  This is used for both
Aspirations that display in the UI within the Aspiration panel and for
Aspirations that exist in the background.
